description: The parent remediation_wave workflow input: the operator-approved wave plan (DECISIONS.md D6) — briefs paired with their member ledger entries, the serial strata of parallel brief ids, and the run configuration shared by every child.

entries.description: The brief's member ledger entries (agent-facing fields).

strata.description: Serial strata of brief ids; briefs within a stratum run in parallel. Every brief must appear in exactly one stratum.
